full_text:
Chang Shi 常峕
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chang Shi (常峕)was born in Wen county, Henei commandery. Claimed illness to avoid quelling Zhuge Dan, executed by Sima Zhao. Chang Shi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Chang Shi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
